tasks.label: 1. Install Root Dependencies
tasks.detail: Step 1: Install all project dependencies in root directory

tasks.label: 3. Kill Port 3000
tasks.command: $proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($proc) { $proc | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output 'Killed process on port 3000' } else { Write-Output 'No process found on port 3000' }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1
tasks.detail: Step 3: Kill any process using port 3000

tasks.label: 4. Clean Docs node_modules
tasks.command: if (Test-Path '${workspaceFolder}\docs\node_modules') { Remove-Item '${workspaceFolder}\docs\node_modules' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output 'node_modules cleaned or not exists'

tasks.label: 5. Clean Docs Cache
tasks.command: if (Test-Path '${workspaceFolder}\docs\.docusaurus') { Remove-Item '${workspaceFolder}\docs\.docusaurus' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path '${workspaceFolder}\docs\build') { Remove-Item '${workspaceFolder}\docs\build' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output 'Cache cleaned'
tasks.detail: Step 5: Delete docs/.docusaurus and docs/build directories

tasks.label: 6. Install Docs Dependencies
tasks.detail: Step 6: Execute pnpm install in docs directory

tasks.label: Full Setup: Install + Build + Start Docs
tasks.detail: Complete workflow: Install dependencies -> Build project -> Kill port -> Clean docs -> Install docs deps -> Start Docusaurus dev server
